The LonDimension class¶

New in version 0.1.

Module author: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

class slicer.cf10.LonDimension(IndexedDimension)¶

Summary¶

The LonDimension class inherits from IndexedDimension and specializes the method __call__ to deal with the special case for longitudes of overlapping. If the values requested define an interval which overlaps the limits of the dimension and the dimension is global (360 degrees), __call__ returns two slices instead of one, in order to deal with the overlapping of memory.

The private method adjust_values deals with different representations of longitude, normalizes longitudes and detects overlapping. An interval of {340,-40} is valid for this dimension.
